description: The modern, Portugeuse archipelago of Madeira seems to have been identified by some ancient authors with the "Fortunatae Insulae" or "Blessed Islands".

history.comment: removing connection to Atlantic until we can sort out what to do with this and related items, which are soupy

provenance: Barrington Atlas: BAtlas 1a A2 Fortunatae? Inss.
